description: Fine-tune a pretrained molecular model (chemberta, grover, or molformer) on a property-prediction task — a MoleculeNet benchmark (tox21/bbbp/bace/hiv/delaney/freesolv/lipo) or a custom SMILES CSV — and evaluate it.
rules: read-only / local — reads a CSV (or downloads a MoleculeNet benchmark + pretrained weights) and writes a report; no remote or live service is mutated
exactly one of DATASET (MoleculeNet) or DATA_CSV (custom) must be set
featurizer is chosen per model: Raw/DummyFeaturizer for chemberta+molformer, GraphConv for grover
report (model info, fine-tuning log, evaluation metrics) written to record_store
needs deepchem[torch] + RDKit + network access to download pretrained weights at run time; porter degrades gracefully if absent
usage: Set MODEL (chemberta|grover|molformer). Then either DATASET (a MoleculeNet name) OR DATA_CSV + TARGET (space-separated columns) + SMILES_COL + TASK_TYPE (classification|regression). EPOCHS sets fine-tuning epochs. Output: transfer_learning.txt.
limitation: Not hermetic offline — fine-tuning requires deepchem with a torch backend, RDKit, and network access to fetch pretrained weights (e.g. ChemBERTa from HuggingFace). Without them the porter writes transfer_learning.txt noting the missing dependency and exits 0.
